title: ZombieVillagerIgnoreDifficulty
description: One-mixin mod that makes zombies ignore difficulty while converting villagers.
body:
# ZombieVillagerIgnoreDifficulty (ZVID)

One mixin mod that makes zombies ignore difficulty while converting villagers. 

Does what it says on the tin, doesn't require any dependencies and is built for ~1.21. (though older versions will probably work if you edit the manifest, I didn't have time to test every version.)
